halts.evidence: venue_scope_fit_matrix.md row totals listed in alphabetical order (JFR / LMCS / MCS / TCS); w21_lane1_lean_relaunch_decision_packet.md PICK options listed alphabetically; no recommended-pick line in any deliverable; cross_venue_compatibility.md and submission_log_item26_splice_spec.md preserve agent-side venue-neutrality.

All 4 cover-letter framings present the manuscript abstract verbatim from tunnell_afm_R2.tex L90-99 in two separate > -prefixed blockquote spans (sentence 1 = 21 words = abstract L90-93; sentence 2 = 35 words = abstract L93-99). The split structure is forced by the HALT_079_QUOTE_LENGTH 50-word ceiling; the per-span content is verbatim. No rewritten abstract appears in any deliverable.

Title 'A Layered, Axiom-Isolated Lean 4 Formalization of the Congruent Number Problem up to Tunnell's Criterion' appears verbatim in all 4 cover-letter framings + cross_venue_compatibility.md D.4 + submission_log_item26_splice_spec.md schema; no alternative title proposed in any deliverable.

No deliverable proposes structural changes (page count, section restructure, content trimming, content additions) to the manuscript. Section-routing request (TCS Logic and Semantics section) is a routing preference, not a scope change.

All ISSN / DOI prefix / URL / EiC fields in venue_profile_*.md were retrieved live during this session from lmcs.episciences.org / jfr.unibo.it / portal.issn.org / dblp.org / sciencedirect.com or marked UNKNOWN with the specific information gap. No identifier was synthesized. Pre-verification rule (post-031 verdict) applied.

Every STRONG / MODERATE / WEAK score in venue_scope_fit_matrix.md is backed by a directly-quotable line from the corresponding venue_profile_*.md or from a fetched venue homepage. UNKNOWN cells (10 of 28) are documented with the specific information gap.
submission_log_item26_splice_spec.md proposes Item 26 (next sequential after Item 25) only. No Item-27, Item-25b, or other variant is offered.

PowerShell-driven Select-String scan over all 12 production .md deliverables returned 0 ASSERTION hits on {closes, discharges, proves, establishes, ratifies, demonstrates, shows} (case-insensitive, word-boundary). The verbatim abstract quote contains 'fully proved' (past-participle 'proved', not the present-tense 'proves' in the forbidden set), and the manuscript-cited phrase '(proved by strong induction)' uses the same past-participle form. See forbidden_verb_scan.md for full scan output.

PowerShell-driven span-state scan over all 12 production .md deliverables returns max quote length 35 words (abstract sentence 2, appearing in all 4 cover-letter framings); ceiling 50 words; margin 15 words. Initial draft used a single > -wrapped outer letter making each ~210-word letter a single quoted span; restructure dropped the outer wrapping and split the abstract into two separate > -prefixed sentence-level spans (sentence 1 = 21 words; sentence 2 = 35 words). See quote_length_scan.md for full per-file table and verbatim quote inventory.
